name: Goat Cheese Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean mushrooms with damp paper towels. Remove stems and reserve them for another use.
2. Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add olive oil and sauté mushroom caps for 5 minutes. Remove from the skillet and drain on paper towels.
3. In the same skillet, add green onions and continue to sauté until tender. Stir in Parmesan cheese and toasted pecans, fresh thyme, and black pepper.
4. Crumble goat cheese evenly into the mushroom caps. Spoon the breadcrumb mixture evenly over the goat cheese and sprinkle with remaining Parmesan cheese.
5. Arrange mushrooms on a rack in a broiler pan coated with cooking spray.
6. Broil 5-1/2 inches from heat (with electric oven door partially opened) for 2-3 minutes, or until lightly browned. Per serving: 44 calories.
